description: Roll a budget Constraint up (BL-11): total of stated contributions vs the limit, the worst dependency path among contributors (the path-cumulative rollup — end-to-end latency, mass down a chain), basis coverage (estimated vs measured), and an honest verdict — `incomplete` when any contribution is unstated, because a partial sum passed off as a total is how budgets lie. Contributors with no stated number are listed, never zeroed.
name: budget_report
